exact_quote: Campton Mountain has offered night skiing for over 30 years and lights up at night with 35+, 500-watt halogen lights ... double chairlift and rope tow ... part of the Waterville Estates community, built in 1969 at 1,505 feet elevation, with 313 feet of vertical terrain
